name: Ansell Limited
analysis: ANN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 16% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$29.8500. Trade idea: entry A$31.1650, stop A$28.1506, target A$40.2081 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
